heading: Today
text: Patchy fog giving with to increasing amounts of sun.  Cool.

heading: Thursday Night
text: Clearing and cool. Some patchy frost.
temperature: 30s to near 40, 30 in the cold spots

heading: Friday
text: Sun and clouds. An isolated shower or sprinkle.

heading: Saturday
text: A little sun and a chance of showers north. Showers becoming likely south.
